# Provence Wine Club

Site: Provence Wine Club
Founder: Emilie Blanc
Website: https://emiliewineclub.com

> Provence Wine Club is a curated Provence rose wine discovery and education platform founded by Emilie Blanc, a Provence-born wine specialist based in Australia.

## Mission

Introduce Australian wine lovers to Provence rose wine through expert curation, tastings, education, events, and Mediterranean food pairings.

## Expertise

- Provence Rosé Wine
- French Wine Regions
- Wine Pairing
- Rosé Wine Culture
- Mediterranean Cuisine Pairings

## Primary Topics

- Provence rosé wines
- Provence Wine Club
- Emilie Blanc wine expert
- best rosé wines in Australia
- rosé wine tasting
- food pairing with rosé
- Provence wine culture

## Audience

- Wine enthusiasts
- Fine dining lovers
- Collectors
- Wine travellers
- Hospitality professionals

## Authority

Emilie Blanc is the Provence-born founder of Provence Wine Club and is recognised for her expertise in Provence rosé wines, tastings, curation, and food pairing.

## Contact

info@emiliewineclub.com
